def negative_unclosed_tempfile_or_tmp_directory_from_tempfile_module():
    rule_id = "unclosed_tempfile_or_tmp_directory_from_tempfile_module"
    family = "boundaries"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile or TemporaryDirectory created without delete=False or a context manager."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
